candidate_assessments.reason: The public contract evidence identifies a daily dataset but does not prove one bounded response can cover the requested three-year range. Existing repository evidence treats this endpoint as a latest-day snapshot.
The official catalogue describes close and monthly average fields, not daily OHLCV.
The official page requires a date and security code query and does not expose a bounded three-year all-market response contract.

The official service describes ordered historical transaction products, but no public unauthenticated endpoint, exact daily OHLCV schema, license terms for repository fixtures, or work-unit download contract has been approved.

The official product is raw transaction data rather than daily OHLCV, is custom-produced, excludes the most recent year, and restricts purchased data to internal use; it cannot prove the selected range through an approved public work-unit download.

The official product is a paid Data E-Shop subscription. Its schema and coverage are technically suitable, but paid products are outside the free research-data workbench boundary and cannot be activated.

license_and_retention.attribution: 資料來源：臺灣證券交易所

official_evidence.finding: The official Daily Quotes product lists daily OHLCV fields and permits up to 60 months in one subscription order, but it is a paid Data E-Shop subscription and is rejected by the free-only product boundary.
The official catalogue suggestion records that the public dataset only exposes the post-update single quote and requests historical date-and-security-code access.
The official historical surface exposes date and security-code inputs, not a bounded three-year all-market response contract.
The official Data E-Shop describes ordered historical transaction products; no public unauthenticated bulk download contract was found.
The official trade-file product covers all stocks by month but is raw transaction data, custom-produced, excludes the most recent year, and restricts purchased data to internal use.

evidence.finding: Still documented and reported (2026-06) as a latest-day full-market snapshot with no historical depth; rejection for P5 bulk stands.
Still an interactive per-date per-security-code query surface; no bounded all-market bulk contract; rejection stands.

Page fetched 2026-07-22: daily OHLCV fields, start date 1992-01-04, files TWT62U/TWT69U/TWTA5U, but unit of subscription is month with cart checkout; paid subscription, rejected under the free-only boundary.
Page fetched 2026-07-22: free, daily update, OHLCV fields, government open-data license v1; confirms the daily dataset metadata only, not three-year bulk coverage.
Still candidate only; digest and same-work-unit version binding remain pending capture at activation.

decision.summary: No free official bounded three-year bulk source exists as of the 2026-07-22 re-verification. The user selected option C on 2026-07-22; P5.1 stays blocked until a fresh P5.1 contract pass for the chosen endpoint and the pre-activation evidence list are complete.

user_selection.note: Selection approves the request-budget and work-unit-shape amendment direction only. It does not activate capture; no provider call is authorized by this record.

decision_options.description: Amend the free-only product boundary to admit the paid TWSE Data E-Shop Daily Quotes subscription (schema and 1992-01-04 coverage fit the requested window).
impact: Requires amending docs/tqe-product-boundary.md (paid subscriptions are currently out of scope).
Introduces recurring subscription cost and Data E-Shop license terms that must be reviewed for local raw and normalized retention.
P5 could then proceed to P5.3/P5.4 with the requested three-year window unchanged.
decision_options.required_human_approval: User approval to amend the product boundary and approve the subscription purchase and license review.

decision_options.description: Reduce the P5 history-depth goal so the free latest-day STOCK_DAY_ALL snapshot can accumulate history going forward from activation, backfilling later if a free bulk source appears.
impact: The three-calendar-year admission goal is not met at activation; P1-P4 replay coverage shrinks.
Requires amending workflow/tqe-p5-history-admission.json history_window and the P5 acceptance checklist.
decision_options.required_human_approval: User approval to amend the P5 goal and history_window.

decision_options.description: Amend the execution contract to allow an explicitly bounded per-trading-day capture loop against the official free daily full-market report endpoint (e.g. the legacy MI_INDEX CSV report), driven by the pre-approved official calendar session list for 2023-07-20..2026-07-19.
impact: Request budget grows from the named 2 GETs to roughly one GET per trading session (about 750) plus the calendar GET; host-egress, rate-limit, and terms-of-use review is required.
This is a bounded, enumerated, human-approved loop, not the prohibited implicit unbounded loop; it must be specified session-by-session in the work-unit.
Free-only boundary is preserved; endpoint terms and license for fixture retention still need the full P5.1 evidence set.
decision_options.required_human_approval: User approval to amend the request budget and work-unit shape, plus a fresh P5.1 contract pass for the chosen endpoint.

decision_options.description: Keep P5.1 blocked and wait for TWSE or the government open-data catalogue to publish a free bounded historical bulk artifact.
impact: P5.1 and activation-ready P5.3 remain blocked; P5.2 stays pass.
No cost, no boundary change, no timeline.
decision_options.required_human_approval: None; this is the current default state.

next_action.action: Option C selected 2026-07-22. Complete the fresh P5.1 contract pass for twse_legacy_mi_index_csv (first human trial capture sha256, official calendar digest binding, fixture retention policy approval, per-session work-unit digest approval) before any activation. Top-level status stays source_contract_blocked until that pass is recorded.

query_parameters.type: ALL (full market incl. warrants/CBBC; ALLBUT0999 excludes warrants/CBBC)

response_contract.content: CSV with multiple sections; index rows are prefixed with '=' lines, the full-market section starts at the 證券代號 header row; encoding historically Big5/CP950 (must be detected and recorded at trial capture)

option_c_endpoint_assessment.historical_depth_evidence: Public tutorials demonstrate arbitrary past dates on this endpoint (2018-01-31, 2021-05-07, 2022-04-12); the commonly cited earliest available date is 2004-02-11. Exact earliest date and per-day availability inside 2023-07-20..2026-07-19 must be proven by the first human trial capture, not assumed.

terms_and_rate_limit.robots_txt: https://www.twse.com.tw/robots.txt fetched 2026-07-22: only /epaper/ and /FTSE/ are disallowed for generic agents; MI_INDEX download path is not robots-disallowed.
terms_and_rate_limit.explicit_terms: No explicit bulk-download prohibition was located on the official page during read-only verification; terms-of-use and open-data license review remains a pre-activation requirement.
terms_and_rate_limit.rate_limit: TWSE publishes no numeric rate limit; community reports describe IP throttling/ban on dense crawling. The work-unit therefore serializes requests with a conservative delay and a hard session cap.

verification_evidence.finding: Documents the exact CSV URL shape: https://www.twse.com.tw/exchangeReport/MI_INDEX?response=csv&date=YYYYMMDD&type=ALL returning the all-market daily closing quotes CSV including sector indices.
Demonstrates a historical date (2018-01-31) retrieval with type=ALL and the parsing rule: strip '='-prefixed index lines, locate the 證券代號 header row; includes the 本益比 column.
Shows GET with response=csv&date=20220412&type=ALLBUT0999; confirms the type parameter variants and the need for a plain User-Agent header.
Lists the exact 16-column CSV schema: 證券代號, 證券名稱, 成交股數, 成交筆數, 成交金額, 開盤價, 最高價, 最低價, 收盤價, 漲跌(+/-), 漲跌價差, 最後揭示買價, 最後揭示買量, 最後揭示賣價, 最後揭示賣量, 本益比.
Notes from practitioner experience that overly dense crawling of twse.com.tw is throttled or banned; motivates the serialized, capped, human-run loop.
Only /epaper/ and /FTSE/ are disallowed; the MI_INDEX download path is not excluded by robots policy.

first_trial_capture.approval: 2026-07-22 user instruction: playwright verification with stock 2308
first_trial_capture.provider_calls_note: Human-approved bounded trial: 1 interactive page load + 2 CSV GETs. The top-level provider_calls_made_by_repository counter tracks P5 activation and remains 0 until activation.

captures.raw_file_note: Stored gzip-compressed (685068 bytes, gz sha256:ae16eda9123f3814484fd1e7b9ef02ee6bd3dc2ca80fc99ed976d45ef876b288) to stay under the S9 release-hardening 2 MB artifact audit; the recorded sha256 is of the uncompressed CSV and was verified by decompressing.

interactive_check.title: 個股日成交資訊 - TWSE 臺灣證券交易所

first_trial_capture.encoding_probe: content-type declares charset=ms950; strict UTF-8 decode fails; CP950 decode succeeds. Encoding confirmed ms950/CP950 for both endpoints.
first_trial_capture.schema_probe: MI_INDEX_ALL_20260721.csv: 30871 lines, 16-column 證券代號 header at line 313 matching response_contract.full_market_columns exactly; 1083 four-digit securities in the full-market section; 2308 台達電 row present with complete OHLCV. STOCK_DAY_2308_20260701.csv: 23 lines, daily OHLCV rows for 2026-07 (115/07/01 onward).

hard_stop: Do not activate P5 with a paid subscription, substitute the latest-day endpoint, or create an implicit unbounded loop until a free public source contract is proven and approved. The option C selection authorizes contract amendment work only; capture starts only after the fresh P5.1 pass and the option_c_endpoint_assessment.required_before_activation list are complete.
